title: Context Budget Decision
description: Context budget decision audit trail (tracks how context tier was determined)

source.description: Decision source (user_explicit = user provided in request, user_profile = user's saved preference, llm_classifier = Claude Haiku classification, static_fallback = rule-based mapping)

examples: Classified by Claude Haiku as tier 3 (recent history needed)

classifier_confidence.description: LLM classifier confidence (0-100, only for llm_classifier source)
